productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Aqua Blue & White Grey Striped Shirt
description: Composition Aqua blue shirt with thin white, light grey and dark grey stripes, made of a blended fabric, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Wash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Thin white, light grey and dark grey stripes add a touch of discreet styling to this aqua blue shirt from mark taylor. The spread collar, patch pocket and curved hemline accentuate the clean design. Pair it with chinos or jeans and leather slip-on shoes. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-5.11', Shoulders-17.5"
